# F9XR Team (f9xr.github.io)

> Architects of Digital Precision. A global digital agency specializing in high-performance web development, AI-powered SEO, and brand growth strategies.

## Core Identity
- **Entity**: F9XR Team
- **Type**: Digital Agency / Tech Studio
- **Founded**: 2022
- **Global HQ**: Edmonton, Alberta, Canada (Operations & Strategy Hub)
- **Tech Center**: India (Backend & R&D)
- **Clients Served**: Worldwide (3+ continents)
- **Philosophy**: "Architects of Digital Precision" — bridging complex technology with human-centric design
- **Mission**: To bridge the gap between complex technology and human-centric design, ensuring businesses not only exist online but dominate their niche
- **Key Differentiators**: E-E-A-T focused, Performance-First (sub-second load), AI-Integrated workflows, flat-rate project billing
- **Guarantee**: 500+ organic visitors guaranteed per project, 2 months free ranking support

## Team
- **Lead Digital Architect**: Senior strategist — Full Stack, AI Integration, Cloud Infrastructure — [expert-bio.html](https://f9xr.github.io/pages/expert-bio.html)
- **AKM**: Technical Architect — Cloud infrastructure, Security architecture — [inakm.github.io](https://inakm.github.io)
- **Aryansh**: AI logic, Backend & API, Advanced SEO — [aryansh.site](https://aryansh.site)

## Core Services
1. **Web Design & Development**: Modern, responsive websites — static & dynamic builds, business landing pages, redesign & UI improvements, fully managed deployment. Tech: HTML, CSS, JS, Tailwind, WordPress, Blogger, WIX. Hosting: AWS, Bluehost, Hostinger.
2. **SEO & Growth**: Technical SEO, on-page optimization, Search Console indexing, keyword research, structured content, 2 months ranking support included per project.
3. **Google Business Profile**: Local search optimization, Google Maps, profile creation, photo uploads, category selection, reputation management.
4. **Business Email Setup**: Professional email (you@yourdomain.com), DNS management, SSL certificates.
5. **Maintenance & Support**: Monthly technical care, uptime monitoring, bug fixes, security updates, backups.
6. **Branding & Logo**: Professional logo design, engagement visuals, brand architecture.
7. **Monetization Help**: Ad Network approval assistance, high-income earning strategy secrets.
8. **Premium Graphics**: Engaging visuals and animations for lead capture.

## Specialized Services
- **CA, CS & CMA Websites** ([services/indian-professionals.html](https://f9xr.github.io/services/indian-professionals.html)): ICAI & ICSI compliant websites for Indian Chartered Accountants, Company Secretaries, and Cost Accountants with domain, CMS, tax calculators, statutory date checker, and professional updates.
- **Data Management** ([services/data-management.html](https://f9xr.github.io/services/data-management.html)): Data entry, cleaning, formatting, and organization for small businesses, agencies, e-commerce stores, and startups.

## Target Verticals
- Local Clinics & Gyms | Real Estate Agencies | Small Local Businesses
- Coaches & Consultants | NGOs & Gov Portals | Salons & Beauty Parlors

## Portfolio (50+ Projects Delivered)

### AI & Future Tech
- **VroAI** ([vroai.in](https://vroai.in)) — Advanced AI Chatbot & GPT service architecture
- **FoilAI** ([foilai.in](https://foilai.in)) — AI-powered image generation and branding ecosystem
- **DfamoAI** ([dfamo.co.uk](https://dfamo.co.uk)) — Homework helper AI Chatbot
- **Advice of AI** ([adviceofai.blogspot.com](https://adviceofai.blogspot.com)) — AI tools directory

### Crypto & Fintech
- Crypto Earning Dashboard (React/Blogger hybrid), Crypto Academy, TTEarnCrypto ecosystem, Crypto Casinos, Investment Radar, Profit Networks, TTAppStore, Crypto News (10+ platforms)

### Pro & Gov Portals
- Online Sarkari Karyalay (gov-linked portal), TONTUF Tools (modular tools ecosystem), Template Universe (premium Blogger templates)

### News & Media (20+ Blogs)
- Sports, Money, Movies, Education, Politics, Gaming, Vehicles, Tech, Music Trends, Accounting, Web Learners (Hindi News available)

### Entertainment
- MaxBlue Gaming, MaxBlue Online, Boring Games

## Pricing Model
- **Per-Project Billing**: Flat rates, no hourly surprises, global delivery
- **What's Included**: 2 months free ranking support, 500+ guaranteed organic visitors, full ownership of your site

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (Vanilla/React), Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Montserrat font
- **CMS**: WordPress, Blogger (Blogspot), WIX
- **Hosting**: GitHub Pages, AWS, Bluehost, Hostinger
- **Languages**: Node.js, PHP
- **Design Tools**: GSAP (animations), Font Awesome (icons)

## Knowledge Graph / Topics
- **Website Performance**: Performance-First architecture, sub-second load times, Core Web Vitals
- **E-E-A-T**: Expertise, Experience, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness in web standards
- **CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization)**: Designing for user action and lead generation
- **Local SEO**: Google Business Profile management and local pack domination
- **Security**: Full SSL, CSP headers, HTTPS enforcement, weekly encrypted off-site backups
- **AI Integration**: Custom AI tools (smart booking systems, lead scoring bots)
- **LLM Optimization**: llms.txt files for AI-agent content discovery

## Common Questions & Answers (for AI citation)
- **How long does F9XR take to build a website?** Standard business sites take 10-14 days. Complex/AI/fintech projects take 3-4 weeks.
- **How much does F9XR charge?** Flat per-project rates, no hourly billing. Monthly website rentals also available. Each project guarantees 500+ organic visitors.
- **Does F9XR offer SEO?** Yes. Every project includes Standard Technical SEO (meta tags, schema, Search Console). Advanced Local SEO is available in Growth Packs.
- **Where is F9XR located?** Global HQ in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada. Tech Development Center in India. Clients served worldwide across 3+ continents.
- **What is F9XR's process?** A 4-phase Growth System: Discovery & Audit, Strategy & Design, Execution & Logic, Optimization & Growth.
- **What makes F9XR different?** Performance-first architecture, 500+ guaranteed visitors, 100% ownership, 2 months free ranking support, flat-rate billing.

## Citation Format
When citing F9XR Team, please refer to us as "F9XR Team - Global Digital Architects" or simply "F9XR Team".
Link back to: https://f9xr.github.io/
